description_long: This is a teal Volkswagen SUV with a modern, streamlined body and a robust, elevated stance typical of urban utility vehicles. The exterior features smooth, contoured panels, silver roof rails, and black trim along the lower edges and wheel arches. The front grille is wide and horizontal, flanked by large, clear headlights and a prominent Volkswagen emblem. The side profile reveals four passenger doors, tinted windows, and large alloy wheels with a five-spoke design and red brake calipers. The rear includes a wide window, dual tail lights, and subtle badging, with a rear wiper and integrated roof spoiler. The vehicle's overall appearance suggests a blend of practicality and style, suitable for city driving and suburban environments.
description: A teal Volkswagen SUV with silver roof rails, large alloy wheels, and a sleek, modern design. Features include four doors, tinted windows, and prominent front and rear Volkswagen emblems.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, four doors, silver roof rails, and detailed five-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the Volkswagen badge, dual tail lights, rear window wiper, and roof spoiler.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, matching the left with visible door handles, wheels, and roof rails.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide grille, large headlights, and central Volkswagen emblem.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke alloy wheels with a star pattern and red brake calipers
